fields.value: private deployment supporting cloud, on-premises, and hybrid environments
Businesses in regulated or sensitive industries cannot accept the standard AI provider bargain of sending data to train shared models

evidence.quote: For Vaspian’s core markets, including debt collection, healthcare, and other industries where conversations carry sensitive and regulated information, that distinction is the entire point.

BlueMesh is designed around private deployment and complete data ownership, supporting cloud, on-premises, and hybrid environments, with built-in data encryption, role-based access control, security guardrails, and the ability to run AI models on infrastructure the customer or Vaspian controls.
A dedicated AI engineering team and recruiting investment to bring AI-fluent talent into the company

Most AI providers operate on a simple bargain: send us your data, and we will send back intelligence, often using that same data to train models that benefit everyone else. For businesses in regulated or sensitive industries, that bargain is a non-starter.
